label: Implement plan
summary: Implemented Nix-built store-backed npm package loading for 10 Pi packages. Replaced per-package fetchurl extraction with a single buildNpmPackage derivation that installs all pi packages and their runtime dependencies in node_modules. Pi core peer deps (@earendil-works/pi-*, typebox) are stripped from direct resolution and provided by the pi runtime.

created.description: Builds config/phenix-pi using buildNpmPackage with npmDepsHash (v2 fetcher). Attempted importNpmLock first but it failed with ENOTCACHED errors for transitive deps; documented the fallback.
Generated by npm install --package-lock-only. Pi-core peer dep entries had null integrity; patched with computed sha512 hashes so Nix can fetch them deterministically.

modified.changes: Added 'chains' to pi manifest, updated dependencies to pinned versions, declared peerDependencies for pi-core packages

changes: Replaced per-package fetchNpmPiPackage/fetchNpmPiPackageWithDeps machinery with single phenixPiPackage build
Removed old fetchNpmPiPackage, piCorePackageNames, fetchNpmPiPackageWithDeps, npmPiPackageSimpleSpecs, npmPiPackageWithDepsSpecs
Added phenixPiPackageDirs array with paths to each of 10 packages in node_modules
Replaced phenix-pi-config-dir check with phenix-pi-package-check (validates pi manifest and all 10 package installs)
Added packageDirs mkOption for store-backed package directories
Updated generatedSettings to use packagePaths instead of hard-coded packages list

key_decisions.reason: importNpmLock failed with ENOTCACHED errors for transitive dependencies (zod-to-json-schema). npmDepsHash with npmDepsFetcherVersion=2 is functionally equivalent and more reliable for this use case.

key_decisions.decision: Strip pi-core deps from package.json before lock generation
key_decisions.reason: Pi core packages (@earendil-works/pi-*, typebox) are declared as peerDependencies in the root package.json. They were removed from dependencies before generating the lock file to avoid null integrity issues. They're provided by pi runtime at extension load time.

key_decisions.decision: Patch null-integrity lock file entries with computed sha512 hashes
key_decisions.reason: Nested @earendil-works/pi-* entries under pi-coding-agent had null integrity (node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-{agent-core,ai,tui}). These were patched with SHA-512 hashes computed from the tarballs so Nix can fetch them deterministically.
